_note: sidecar oracle for url() serialization (NOT a wire fixture; wire fixtures stay byte-identical). Keyed by (plugin, caseName) over the union of cases/<plugin>.json (url() only) and cases/url-oracle/<plugin>.json (url()-only source). reserialize=[stage1, stage2] is upstream parse->url()->parse->url() for D4. In inventory, a bare '+'/'-'/':' conditional entry is the custom prefix-mapping FAMILY, not a literal key.
